name: optimize-anything
description: Optimize any text artifact using gepa — prompts, code, configs, skills
author: optimize-anything contributors

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Run optimization on a seed artifact with an evaluator

commands.name: generate-evaluator
commands.description: Generate an evaluator script for a text artifact

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the optimization plan for a seed artifact

commands.name: budget
commands.description: Recommend evaluation budget for a seed artifact

commands.name: score
commands.description: Score a single artifact with an evaluator without optimizing

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze an artifact to discover quality dimensions for LLM judge optimization

skills.name: generate-evaluator
skills.description: Generate an evaluator script for a text artifact, choosing the right scoring pattern for the objective

skills.name: optimization-guide
skills.description: Guide for running optimizations with optimize-anything, covering modes, configuration, and interpretation
